docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY INGRAM, MAE BELLE THYMES, GIRLEY AS TO DEFENDANT PRUDENTIAL LOAN CO. BEST COLLATERAL & CO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-18-1996 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C
